title: Iran to offer ‘commercial bonanza’ to US companies
description: Tehran is seeking to tempt Donald Trump with investments in its oil and gas reserves as it seeks to stave off an attack
content: Tehran is seeking to tempt Donald Trump with investments in its oil and gas reserves as it seeks to stave off an attack
